info.title: JuristAI Tools
info.description: JuristAI legal-platform tools for the chat agent.

post.summary: Generate a bill for a case.
post.description: Generates or regenerates a case bill for a billing window the authenticated user can access. Exposed to the LibreChat assistant as a callable tool.

get.summary: Retrieve a billing summary for a case.
get.description: Returns a billing summary for a case and billing window the authenticated user can access. summaryText is a JSON-encoded digest with billingHeader, overview metrics, topBillers, topTasks, missedOpportunities (completed work not captured in the total, e.g. no hourly rate set or no time logged), upcoming work due in the next 7 days, and a plainText fallback for direct quoting. Exposed to the LibreChat assistant as a callable tool.

post.summary: Accept a legal team invite for the authenticated user.
post.description: Accepts a pending legal team invite for the authenticated user's email address.

get.summary: List action items for a case.
get.description: Lists action items for a case the authenticated user can access.

post.summary: Create an action item.
post.description: Creates a case-scoped action item for a case the authenticated user can access.

patch.description: Updates a case-scoped action item the authenticated user can access.

post.summary: Assign or reassign an action item.
post.description: Assigns an action item to a user for a case the authenticated user can access.

post.summary: Complete an action item.
post.description: Marks an action item complete for a case the authenticated user can access.

post.summary: Add an existing case to a workspace or create a new matter when no docket match exists.
post.description: Resolves teammate targeting, searches for an existing docket first, starts the existing-case assignment workflow when a match exists, and otherwise starts the create-new-case workflow for a brand-new matter.

post.summary: Start the existing-case assignment workflow for a docket already known to JuristAI.
post.description: Starts the add-case-step Step Function for a known docket or case identifier plus an explicit role. When userId is omitted, the authenticated caller is assigned by default. This is exposed to the LibreChat assistant as a callable workflow starter.

post.summary: Assign a legal team's members to a case.
post.description: Assigns all current legal team members to a case when the authenticated user has admin-level authority.

post.summary: Assign a user to a case.
post.description: Assigns the authenticated user, or an admin-selected user, to a case.

get.summary: Get a calendar view for a case.
get.description: Returns case deadlines and docket events for a case the authenticated user can access.

get.summary: List important dates for a case.
get.description: Lists important dates for a case the authenticated user can access.

post.summary: Create an important date for a case.
post.description: Creates an important date for a case the authenticated user can access.

patch.description: Updates an important date for a case the authenticated user can access.

get.summary: List docket timeline entries for a case.
get.description: Lists docket timeline entries for a case the authenticated user can access.

get.summary: List case signatures.
get.description: Lists signature requests for a case the authenticated user can access.

parameters.name: status
parameters.description:
* `DRAFT` - DRAFT
* `PREPARED` - PREPARED
* `SENT` - SENT
* `VIEWED` - VIEWED
* `PARTIALLY_SIGNED` - PARTIALLY_SIGNED
* `COMPLETED` - COMPLETED
* `DECLINED` - DECLINED
* `EXPIRED` - EXPIRED
* `VOIDED` - VOIDED
* `SYNC_REQUIRED` - SYNC_REQUIRED
* `FAILED` - FAILED

post.summary: Determine the current procedural posture for a case.
post.description: Returns the current litigation status and posture for a case using the same docket-classification lambda the intent handler calls.

post.summary: Run deadlines insight for a case.
post.description: Runs the deadlines insight workflow for a case and returns the workflow response. Exposed to the LibreChat assistant as a callable tool.

post.summary: Export firm hours for the authenticated user's assigned cases.
post.description: Exports logged hours for the actor's assigned cases for a billing period and delivery format. When caseIds or billing dates are omitted, the callable defaults to the actor's current assigned cases and the same legacy weekly billing windows used by the email intent handler.

post.summary: Retrieve metadata for a specific case or docket.
post.description: Returns structured metadata for a case identified by docket id or related lookup fields. Exposed to the LibreChat assistant as a callable tool.

post.summary: Connect scheduling conferencing.
post.description: Starts conferencing provider connection for scheduling.

get.summary: Get the most recent docket entry for a case.
get.description: Returns the most recent docket entry for a case the authenticated user can access.

post.summary: Invite a user to a legal team or case collaboration context.
post.description: Triggers the legal team invite workflow for the supplied invite details. Exposed to the LibreChat assistant as a callable tool.

get.summary: List members of a legal team.
get.description: Lists members of a legal team the authenticated user belongs to or can administer.

get.summary: List the authenticated user's cases.
get.description: Lists the authenticated user's assigned cases, optionally filtered by scope.

get.summary: List organization members for the authenticated user's organization.
get.description: Lists organization members for the authenticated user's organization, or an explicitly requested organization when it matches.

post.summary: Query precedent and legal research context.
post.description: Queries precedent-related research helpers for the provided matter context. Exposed to the LibreChat assistant as a callable tool.

post.summary: Prepare bills for the authenticated user's assigned cases.
post.description: Prepares bills for the actor's assigned cases for a billing period. When caseIds or billing dates are omitted, the callable defaults to the actor's current assigned cases and the same legacy weekly billing windows used by the email intent handler.

post.summary: Search case documents and workspace knowledge.
post.description: Queries the RAG search proxy for case-linked documents. Accepts either caseId or docketId plus a query string. Exposed to the LibreChat assistant as a callable tool.

post.summary: Read people dossier records.
post.description: Retrieves full people dossier data for supported case-linked people records. Exposed to the LibreChat assistant as a callable tool.

post.summary: Recommend a lawsuit strategy or draft path.
post.description: Returns lawsuit recommendation guidance for the supplied matter context. Exposed to the LibreChat assistant as a callable tool.

post.summary: Rename a legal team.
post.description: Renames a legal team when the authenticated user has admin-level authority.

post.summary: Ask the user for the most valuable missing case documents.
post.description: Compares hydrated case timeline entries with slim docket metadata and returns a deterministic request for the missing source documents needed to rely on downstream case guidance.

post.summary: Retrieve an existing case summary.
post.description: Retrieves a previously generated case summary for the requested case context. Exposed to the LibreChat assistant as a callable tool.

post.summary: Refresh docket metadata for a known case or docket.
post.description: Refreshes the latest docket metadata for a case already known to JuristAI. When docketId is omitted, the authenticated case context is reused.

post.summary: Retrieve a previously generated document summary.
post.description: Returns a previously generated summary for a document or filing identified by caseId and docketEntryId. Exposed to the LibreChat assistant as a callable tool.

get.summary: List host scheduling bookings.
get.description: Lists bookings for the authenticated host user.

post.summary: Create a scheduling booking.
post.description: Creates a confirmed or pending booking from a reservation.

post.summary: Retry scheduling conferencing.
post.description: Retries conferencing setup for an existing booking.

post.summary: Confirm a scheduling booking.
post.description: Confirms a booking that requires host confirmation.

post.summary: Reschedule a scheduling booking.
post.description: Moves an existing booking to a newly reserved slot.

post.summary: Connect scheduling conferencing.
post.description: Starts conferencing provider connection for scheduling.

get.summary: List host scheduling event types.
get.description: Lists the authenticated host user's scheduling event types.

post.summary: Create a scheduling event type.
post.description: Creates a scheduling event type and optional public booking link for the authenticated host user.

patch.description: Updates an existing scheduling event type for the authenticated host user.

get.summary: Look up a public scheduling link.
get.description: Retrieves the public scheduling metadata for a shareable event type link.

get.summary: Look up a public scheduling link.
get.description: Retrieves the public scheduling metadata for a shareable event type link.

get.summary: List host scheduling schedules.
get.description: Lists the authenticated host user's scheduling schedules.

post.summary: Create a scheduling schedule.
post.description: Creates an availability schedule for the authenticated host user.

patch.description: Updates an existing availability schedule for the authenticated host user.

get.summary: Search available scheduling slots.
get.description: Searches available scheduling slots for an event type link or event type identifier.

post.summary: Create a scheduling slot reservation.
post.description: Temporarily reserves a scheduling slot before a booking is created.

post.summary: Search cases by docket ID or query terms.
post.description: Returns matching case records from the CourtListener index. Exposed to the LibreChat assistant as a callable tool.

post.summary: Create a signature request.
post.description: Creates a case-scoped or workspace-scoped signature request.

get.summary: Get signature request detail.
get.description: Retrieves detail for a specific signature request.

post.summary: Reconcile a signature request.
post.description: Refreshes and reconciles the current provider state for a signature request.

post.summary: Create a self-sign session.
post.description: Creates a self-sign session for a signature request.

post.summary: Send a signature reminder.
post.description: Sends a reminder for an existing signature request.

get.summary: List motion templates available to the authenticated user.
get.description: Returns the current motion templates visible to the authenticated user, including optional scope and filter constraints. Exposed to the LibreChat assistant as a callable tool.

get.summary: List motion templates available to the authenticated user.
get.description: Returns the current motion templates visible to the authenticated user, including optional scope and filter constraints. Exposed to the LibreChat assistant as a callable tool.

get.summary: Show the latest version of a motion template.
get.description: Returns the latest matching motion template with its scope metadata, download link, optional preview link, and a short excerpt of the content. Exposed to the LibreChat assistant as a callable tool.

get.summary: Show the latest version of a motion template.
get.description: Returns the latest matching motion template with its scope metadata, download link, optional preview link, and a short excerpt of the content. Exposed to the LibreChat assistant as a callable tool.

post.summary: Update the authenticated user's hourly billing rate.
post.description: Stores the actor's hourly billing rate directly on the JuristAI user record. Exposed to the LibreChat assistant as a callable tool.

post.summary: Upload one or more case documents into the workspace and finalize hydration.
post.description: Stores user-supplied documents in the target case workspace through the same upload and finalize lambdas the legacy intent handler uses for attachment-backed uploads.
